name: SecurityLocalDecryptAES128ECB
title: SecurityLocalDecryptAES128ECB
syntax: long SecurityLocalDecryptAES128ECB(byte key[], dword keyLength, byte cipheredData[], dword cipheredDataLength, byte plainData[], dword plainDataLength)
description: Decrypts ciphered data with a given key using AES128 (ECB), Padding Mode PKCS5.

parameters.name: byte key[]
parameters.description: The key to be used for AES (128 bit).

parameters.name: dword cipheredDataLength
parameters.description: The length of the ciphered data.

parameters.name: byte plainData[] [Out]
parameters.description: The buffer in which the plain data is stored.

parameters.name: dword plainDataLength [In/Out]
parameters.description: The length of the buffer for the plain data. Typically this buffer should have the same length as the ciphered data buffer.

return: The key to be used for
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
